query: INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, videoUrl, readingMaterial, assignment, lessonOrder) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH'), 'Non-Calculator Problem Solving', 'Develop strategies for solving math problems without calculator.', 'https://example.com/video/no-calc', 'Mental Math Guide', 'Solve using mental math', 14), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH'), 'Multi-Step Problem Solving', 'Master breaking down complex multi-step problems.', 'https://example.com/video/multi-step', 'Multi-Step Guide', 'Solve complex problems', 15), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH'), 'Real-World Applications', 'Apply math concepts to real-world scenarios.', 'https://example.com/video/applications', 'Real-World Applications', 'Solve application problems', 16), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH'), 'Math Test-Taking Strategies', 'Develop time management and test-taking strategies for GED Math.', 'https://example.com/video/math-strategies', 'Math Strategies Guide', 'Practice timed problems', 17), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH'), 'Math Practice and Review', 'Comprehensive review of all math topics with practice questions.', 'https://example.com/video/math-review', 'Math Review Guide', 'Complete math practice test', 18);
